title: Legendary Survival Addon
description: Add new way to cooling and heating with create
body:
## 🔥❄️ About the Legendary Survival Addon

This addon introduces two new kinetic-powered machines for **Create**:

🔥 **Heater** – Raises ambient temperature based on rotational speed

❄️ **Cooler** – Lowers ambient temperature based on rotational speed

> Each machine has **3 upgrade levels**, and their effectiveness scales with **RPM** for precise control.

Both blocks integrate directly with **Create**, offering immersive survival mechanics that respond to the environment in real time.

🛠️ **Note:** Integration for **Create v6.x.x** is released!!!
